lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਜਾਨਾ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਇਗਾ ਰੀ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa jaanaa kiaa hoeigaa ree maaee |
lines.english: How do I know what will happen to me, O my mother?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਰਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har darasan bin rehan na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, I cannot survive. ||1||Pause||
With hope and desire, I approach His Bed,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਸਹ ਭਾਵਾ ਕਿ ਨ ਭਾਵਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aagai seh bhaavaa ki na bhaavaa |2|
lines.english: but I do not know whether He will be pleased with me or not. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਨ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਮੇਰੀ ਤਿਸ ਨ ਬੁਝਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: prem na chaakhiaa meree tis na bujhaanee |
lines.english: I have not tasted His Love, and my thirst is not quenched.
My beautiful youth has run away, and now I, the soul-bride, repent and regret. ||3||
Even now, I am held by hope and desire.
I am depressed; I have no hope at all. ||1||Pause||
She overcomes her egotism, and adorns herself;
the Husband Lord now ravishes and enjoys the soul-bride on His Bed. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਵਡਾਈ ਅਪਣੇ ਖਸਮ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: chhodd vaddaaee apane khasam samaavai |1| rahaau |26|
lines.english: she sheds her self-conceit, and is absorbed in her Lord and Master. ||1||Pause||26||
Then, O Nanak, the bride becomes pleasing to the Mind of her Husband Lord;
Aasaa, First Mehl:
In this world of my father's house, I, the soul-bride, have been very childish;
If He bestows His Glance of Grace, then I shall meet Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਏਕੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sahu meraa ek doojaa nahee koee |
lines.english: My Husband is the One; there is no other like Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਹ ਕੀ ਮੈ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis seh kee mai saar na jaanee |1|
lines.english: I did not realize the value of my Husband Lord. ||1||
In the next world of my in-law's house, I, the the soul-bride, shall realize Truth;
I shall come to know the celestial peace of my Husband Lord. ||2||
By Guru's Grace, such wisdom comes to me,
so that the soul-bride becomes pleasing to the Mind of the Husband Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਭੈ ਭਾਵ ਕਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kehat naanak bhai bhaav kaa kare seegaar |
lines.english: Says Nanak, she who adorns herself with the Love and the Fear of God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਕਿਸ ਕਾ ਪੂਤੁ ਨ ਕਿਸ ਕੀ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: n kis kaa poot na kis kee maaee |
lines.english: No one is anyone else's son, and no one is anyone else's mother.
enjoys her Husband Lord forever on His Bed. ||4||27||
Aasaa, First Mehl:
Through false attachments, people wander around in doubt. ||1||
That person who is filled with all sorts of sins may pray at the Lord's Door,
O My Lord and Master, I am created by You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਜਪੀ ਨਾਉ ਤੇਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaan toon dehi japee naau teraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If You give it to me, I will chant Your Name. ||1||Pause||
Wherever I look, there I find the One Lord. ||3||
but he is forgiven only when the Lord so wills. ||2||
By Guru's Grace, evil-mindedness is destroyed.
then he is absorbed into the Truest of the True. ||4||28||
Aasaa, First Mehl, Dho-Padhay:
Says Nanak, if one comes to such an understanding,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਸਰਵਰੜੈ ਭਈਲੇ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਾਵਕੁ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: tit saravararrai bheele nivaasaa paanee paavak tineh keea |
lines.english: In that pool of the world, the people have their homes; there, the Lord has created water and fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਕਜੁ ਮੋਹ ਪਗੁ ਨਹੀ ਚਾਲੈ ਹਮ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਡੂਬੀਅਲੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pankaj moh pag nahee chaalai ham dekhaa teh ddoobeeale |1|
lines.english: In the mud of earthly attachment, their feet have become mired, and I have seen them drowning there. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਏਕੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਸਿ ਮੂੜ ਮਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man ek na chetas moorr manaa |
lines.english: O foolish people, why don't you remember the One Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਲਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bisarat tere gun galiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Forgetting the Lord, your virtues shall wither away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਉ ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਨਹੀ ਪੜਿਆ ਮੂਰਖ ਮੁਗਧਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa hau jatee satee nahee parriaa moorakh mugadhaa janam bheaa |
lines.english: I am not a celibate, nor am I truthful, nor a scholar; I was born foolish and ignorant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨੑ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾ ਜਿਨੑ ਤੂੰ ਨਾਹੀ ਵੀਸਰਿਆ ॥੨॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: pranavat naanak tina kee saranaa jina toon naahee veesariaa |2|29|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I seek the Sanctuary of those who do not forget You, Lord. ||2||29||
but the Teacher of teachers is the One Lord, who appears in so many forms. ||1||
Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਿਅ ਘਰ ਛਿਅ ਗੁਰ ਛਿਅ ਉਪਦੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: chhia ghar chhia gur chhia upades |
lines.english: There are six systems of philosophy, six teachers, and six doctrines;
And seasons all originate from the one sun,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਤੋਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so ghar raakh vaddaaee tohi |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - follow that system; in it rests greatness. ||1||Pause||
That system, where the Praises of the Creator are sung

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸੁਏ ਚਸਿਆ ਘੜੀਆ ਪਹਰਾ ਥਿਤੀ ਵਾਰੀ ਮਾਹੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: visue chasiaa gharreea paharaa thitee vaaree maahu bheaa |
lines.english: As the seconds, minutes, hours, days, weekdays months
O Nanak, so do all forms originate from the One Creator. ||2||30||
